message:
test(ftui-extras): improve plasma.rs test coverage (bd-50ltp)

Add 25 new tests covering:
- Reduced quality 4-component reference formula verification
- Minimal quality 3-component reference formula verification
- HSV edge cases (secondary colors, hue wrapping, zero S/V, sextants)
- Scratch geometry caching and resize recomputation
- Fire/Galaxy palette segment boundary verification
- Neon full hue cycle, Sunset/Ocean endpoint colors
- lerp midpoint accuracy and boundary clamping
- Breathing envelope modulation
- Extreme time values for wave functions
- Aurora/Ember with custom theme slots (non-fallback paths)
- PlasmaFx Clone and Debug trait coverage

Total plasma::tests: 40 → 65. All gates green (clippy, fmt, tests).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
